---
title: "Data preparation Airport"
editor: visual
---

## Overview

There are several data sets to exploit for the airport data portions.

-   ANAC (FlightBr package and file from VRA)
-   punctuality data
-   TATIC data
-   dsTAXI data
-   KPI08 Data

## Data Loading

### DsTAXI

```         

# shortcut to download folder
pth_downloads <- here::here(here::here() |> dirname() |> dirname(), "Downloads") 

# dsTaxi


# first step read files, in a specific folder 
dstaxi_fn <- fs::dir_ls("data-src", regexp = "(?i)taxi")

# second step: read all files and combine into a single dataframe
dstaxitmp <- dstaxi_fn |>
  purrr::map(~readr::read_csv2(.x) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      match_vra = as.character(match_vra),
      dh_vra = lubridate::as_datetime(dh_vra)
    )
  ) |>
  purrr::list_rbind() 

#Third step: rename  and select collums
dstaxi <- dstaxitmp |> dplyr::rename(
       FLTID = `indicativo`
      , REG = `matricula`
      , ADEP = `adpartida`
      , ADES = `addestino`
      , PHASE = mov
      , MVT_TIME = `dh_bimtra`
      , BLOCK_TIME = `dh_vra`
      , ARCTYP = `tipoaeronave`
      , STND = `box`
      , RWY = `pista`
      ) |> 
  dplyr::select(FLTID 
      , REG
      , ADEP 
      , ADES 
      , MVT_TIME
      , BLOCK_TIME
      , ARCTYP
      , PHASE
      , STND
      , RWY
       )
```

## Punctuality data

```{r}

punc2025 <- read_csv(here::here("data-src" , "puncutality-data-2025.csv"))


bra_punc_raw <- punc2025 |>                          
  mutate(
    SCHED_DT = dmy_hms(SCHED_TIME),
    BLOCK_DT = dmy_hms(BLOCK_TIME),
    
    DELAY_MIN = as.numeric(difftime(BLOCK_DT, SCHED_DT, units = "mins"))
  )

delay_breaks <- c(-Inf, -60, -55, -50, -45, -40, -35, -30, -25,
                  -20, -15, -10, -5, 0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30,
                  35, 40, 45, 50, 55, 60, Inf)

delay_labels <- c(
  "(-INF,-60]","(-60,-55]","(-55,-50]","(-50,-45]","(-45,-40]",
  "(-40,-35]","(-35,-30]","(-30,-25]","(-25,-20]","(-20,-15]",
  "(-15,-10]","(-10,-5]","(-5,0]","(0,5)",          
  "[5,10)","[10,15)","[15,20)","[20,25)","[25,30)",  
  "[30,35)","[35,40)","[40,45)","[45,50)","[50,55)",
  "[55,60)","[60,INF)"
)


bra_punc_binned <- bra_punc_raw |>
  filter(!is.na(DELAY_MIN)) |>
  mutate(
    APT   = ICAO,
    DATE  = as.Date(SCHED_DT),
    MONTH = floor_date(DATE, "month"),
    DELAY_BIN = cut(DELAY_MIN,
                    breaks = delay_breaks,
                    labels = delay_labels,
                    right  = TRUE,
                    include.lowest = FALSE)
  )

# Contagem por bin
counts_daily <- bra_punc_binned |>
  count(APT, DATE, PHASE, DELAY_BIN, name = "n_flights")

# N_VALID por APT+DATE+PHASE
n_valid_daily <- bra_punc_binned |>
  count(APT, DATE, PHASE, name = "N_VALID")

# N_VALID_MONTH por APT+PHASE+month
n_valid_month <- bra_punc_binned |>
  mutate(MONTH = floor_date(DATE, "month")) |>
  count(APT, PHASE, MONTH, name = "N_VALID_MONTH")

# ── 4. Pivot wide 
bra_punc_dist |> group_by(PHASE) |>
  reframe(CHECK = n(),
          across(`(-INF,-60]`:`[60,INF)`, .fns = ~ sum(.x))) |>
  add_dly_early_late_groupings2() |>
  mutate(N = rowSums(across(`(-INF,-60]`:`[60,INF)`))) |>
  mutate(across(.cols = EARLY:WITHIN_M15P15, .fns = ~ .x / N)) |>
  select(PHASE, WITHIN_M15P15) |>
  mutate(REG = "BRA", YEAR = "2025") |>
    left_join(
    bra_punc_binned |>
      group_by(PHASE) |>
      summarise(
        MED_DELAY_MIN = median(DELAY_MIN[DELAY_MIN > 15  & DELAY_MIN <= 60],  na.rm = TRUE),
        MED_EARLY_MIN = abs(median(DELAY_MIN[DELAY_MIN < -15 & DELAY_MIN >= -60], na.rm = TRUE)),
        .groups = "drop"
      ),
    by = "PHASE"
  ) |> 
  print()

bra_punc_dist |> write_csv(here::here("data-src" , "BRA-punc-2025.csv"))

# Rainer function

add_dly_early_late_groupings2 <- function(.punc_df){
     df <- .punc_df |>
         dplyr::mutate(
             EARLY        = rowSums(across(.cols = `(-INF,-60]`:`(-20,-15]`), na.rm = TRUE)
             ,EARLY_M15M05 = (`(-15,-10]` + `(-10,-5]`)
             ,EARLY_M05M00 =  `(-5,0]`
             ,LATE_P00P05  =  `(0,5)`
             ,LATE_P05P15  = (`[5,10)` + `[10,15)`)
             ,LATE         = rowSums(across(.cols = `[15,20)`:`[60,INF)`), na.rm = TRUE)
             ,WITHIN_M05P05= (`(-5,0]` + `(0,5)`)
             ,WITHIN_M15P15= (`(-15,-10]`+`(-10,-5]`+`(-5,0]`+`(0,5)`+`[5,10)`+`[10,15)`)
         )
}


bra_punc_dist |> group_by(PHASE) |>
     reframe(CHECK = n()
             , across(`(-INF,-60]`:`[60,INF)`, .fns = ~ sum(.x) )
     ) |>
     add_dly_early_late_groupings2() |>
     mutate(N = rowSums(across(`(-INF,-60]`:`[60,INF)`)) )|>
     mutate(across(.cols = EARLY:WITHIN_M15P15,.fns =  ~ .x / N) ) |> 
     select(PHASE , WITHIN_M15P15) |>
     mutate(REG = "BRA" , YEAR = "2025") 

```

## Movements data and share off overall network traffic

```{r}

# Received an excel from CGNA with movements from 100 AD 

mov_bra <- readr::read_csv2(here::here("data" , "Movements-Brazil-2023-2024-2025-raw.csv"))


# Change names and create a tibble form 100 Brazilian AD

tot_bra_all <- mov_bra |>
  dplyr::mutate(DATE = lubridate::dmy(DATA_INICIO_BRT)) |>
  dplyr::rename(ICAO = SG_ORGAO, TOT_MOV = TOTAL) |>
  dplyr::mutate(YEAR = lubridate::year(DATE)) |>
  dplyr::group_by(YEAR) |>
  dplyr::reframe(TOT_MOV_ALL = sum(TOT_MOV))

# Change names and create a tibble form study Brazilian airports

mov_bra_study <- mov_bra |>
  dplyr::mutate(DATE = lubridate::dmy(DATA_INICIO_BRT)) |>
  dplyr::rename(ICAO = SG_ORGAO, TOT_MOV = TOTAL) |>
  dplyr::mutate(YEAR = lubridate::year(DATE)) |>
  dplyr::select(ICAO, YEAR, TOT_MOV) |>
  dplyr::filter(ICAO %in% bra_apts) |>        
  dplyr::group_by(YEAR, ICAO) |>
  dplyr::reframe(TOT_MOV_YEAR = sum(TOT_MOV)) 

# Create a csv to show the share between the 100 AD and the study aiports

bra_apt_share <- mov_bra_study |>
  dplyr::left_join(tot_bra_all, by = "YEAR") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    SHARE = TOT_MOV_YEAR / TOT_MOV_ALL * 100,
    YEAR  = factor(YEAR)
  )

bra_apt_share |>
  readr::write_csv(here::here("data" , "bra_apt_lvl_traffic_share.csv"))


### Data manipulation stop here ### The line below should be move to BRA-EUR report


bra_total_share <- bra_apt_share |>
  dplyr::group_by(YEAR) |>
  dplyr::reframe(
    TOT_STUDY = sum(TOT_MOV_YEAR),
    TOT_ALL   = dplyr::first(TOT_MOV_ALL),
    SHARE     = TOT_STUDY / TOT_ALL * 100
  )
  

plot_apt_share <- function(apt_share, total_share, icao_labels, title_label) {

  p_share <- ggplot2::ggplot(
      total_share,
      ggplot2::aes(x = YEAR, y = SHARE, group = 1)
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_line(colour = "grey50", linewidth = 0.4) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(colour = "grey30", size = 2) +
    ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(0, 100),
      labels = scales::label_percent(scale = 1, suffix = "%")
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(x = NULL, y = NULL,
                  title = "share of overall\nnetwork traffic") +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      plot.title       = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0.5)
    )

  p_bars <- ggplot2::ggplot(
      apt_share,
      ggplot2::aes(x = ICAO, y = TOT_MOV_YEAR, fill = YEAR)
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_col(position = "dodge") +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = YEAR_COLORS) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(labels = icao_labels) +
    ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(0, NA),
      expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)),
      labels = scales::label_comma()
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = NULL,
                  title = title_label) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      legend.position  = "top",
      axis.text.x      = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
    )

  (p_share | p_bars) +
    patchwork::plot_layout(widths = ggplot2::unit(c(4, 15), "cm"))
}

p_bra <- plot_apt_share(bra_apt_share, bra_total_share, apt_labels_bra, "Brazil airport level traffic")
p_eur <- plot_apt_share(eur_apt_share, eur_total_share, apt_labels_eur, "European airport level traffic")

```

## Annual traffic at study airports in current Year and variation

```{r}

# Received an excel from CGNA with movements from 100 AD 

mov_bra <- readr::read_csv2(here::here("data" , "Movements-Brazil-2023-2024-2025-raw.csv"))

# Change names and create a tibble form study Brazilian airports

mov_bra_study <- mov_bra |>
  dplyr::mutate(DATE = lubridate::dmy(DATA_INICIO_BRT)) |>
  dplyr::rename(ICAO = SG_ORGAO, TOT_MOV = TOTAL) |>
  dplyr::mutate(YEAR = lubridate::year(DATE)) |>
  dplyr::select(ICAO, YEAR, TOT_MOV) |>
  dplyr::filter(ICAO %in% bra_apts) |>        
  dplyr::group_by(YEAR, ICAO) |>
  dplyr::reframe(TOT_MOV_YEAR = sum(TOT_MOV))

mov_bra_study |>
  readr::write_csv(here::here("data" , "bra_mov_lvl_traffic.csv"))

### Data manipulation stop here ### The line below should be move to BRA-EUR report

plot_apt_bar_var <- function(data, apts_names, title_label) {
  
  # dados para barras — ano de referência
  d_bars <- data |>
    dplyr::filter(YEAR == this_year) |>
    dplyr::left_join(apts_names, by = "ICAO") |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(TOT_MOV_YEAR)) |>
    dplyr::mutate(NAME = factor(NAME, levels = NAME))

  # dados para variação
  d_var <- data |>
    dplyr::filter(YEAR %in% c(this_year - 1, this_year)) |>
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = YEAR, values_from = TOT_MOV_YEAR,
                       names_prefix = "Y") |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      VAR_PCT = (.data[[paste0("Y", this_year)]] - 
                 .data[[paste0("Y", this_year - 1)]]) / 
                 .data[[paste0("Y", this_year - 1)]] * 100
    ) |>
    dplyr::left_join(apts_names, by = "ICAO") |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      NAME  = factor(NAME, levels = levels(d_bars$NAME)),
      COLOR = ifelse(VAR_PCT >= 0, "pos", "neg")
    )

  # painel esquerdo — barras
  p_bars <- ggplot2::ggplot(
      d_bars,
      ggplot2::aes(y = NAME, x = TOT_MOV_YEAR)
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_col(fill = "#2e7d32") +
    ggplot2::geom_text(
      ggplot2::aes(label = ICAO),
      hjust = 0, nudge_x = 1000, size = 2.5, colour = "grey40"
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
      labels = scales::label_comma(),
      expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = title_label) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
    ggplot2::theme(panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank())

  # painel direito — variação %
  p_var <- ggplot2::ggplot(
      d_var,
      ggplot2::aes(y = NAME, x = VAR_PCT, fill = COLOR)
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_col() +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.4, colour = "grey30") +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
      values = c("pos" = "#2ECC71", "neg" = "#E74C3C"),
      guide  = "none"
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
      labels = scales::label_percent(scale = 1, suffix = "%")
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      x     = NULL,
      y     = NULL,
      title = glue::glue("var. {this_year}/{this_year - 1}")
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      axis.text.y      = ggplot2::element_blank()
    )

  (p_bars | p_var) +
    patchwork::plot_layout(widths = ggplot2::unit(c(12, 4), "cm"))
}

p_bra_var <- plot_apt_bar_var(mov_bra_study, bra_apts_names, "Brazil – Annual traffic")
#p_eur <- plot_apt_bar_var(mov_eur_study, eur_apts_names, "Europe – Annual traffic")

#p_bra / p_eur

p_bra_var

```
